best_public_record_now: FCC notice of apparent liability plus FCC consent-decree order text
what_is_safe_now: LIMEN can make narrow lifecycle claims from allegation-stage enforcement through consent-decree closure, including the STIR/SHAKEN attestation posture, compliance-plan terms, and the distinction between proposed and settled penalty stages.
exact_upgrade_trigger: No threshold change needed for lifecycle posture; only selective anchor extraction would strengthen reuse.
no_repeat_guardrail: Do not treat one FCC lifecycle as proof of general deepfake prevalence, judicial findings, or solved provenance controls.
paper_thesis_use: Control row for methods/results prose showing what a fully reusable public enforcement chain looks like inside shard 003.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Exploit the existing document text with compact anchor extraction before adding weaker same-family rows.

best_public_record_now: EEOC filing press release plus EEOC settlement/decree press release with Civil Action No. 1:22-cv-02565
what_is_safe_now: LIMEN can cite agency-reported filing and settlement progression plus the civil-action number, but it still cannot quote complaint, decree, docket-entry, or judicial-order text.
exact_upgrade_trigger: Capture one genuinely different public court-facing complaint, decree, docket entry, or judicial order text from an open court surface or clearly labeled open mirror.
no_repeat_guardrail: Do not repeat EEOC newsroom pages, node redirects, CourtListener web/API paths already logged, Justia search, or EDNY iQuery login checks as if they were new evidence.
paper_thesis_use: Reviewer-safe negative-result row distinguishing source absence in the local package from untried obvious navigation routes.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Retry only on a genuinely different public court-facing or clearly labeled open-mirror surface; otherwise reuse the blocker evidence in methods/limitations prose.

what_is_safe_now: LIMEN can make accusation-stage and document-presence claims, but it still cannot promote the full exact case number from the current locally captured image-only PDF.

no_repeat_guardrail: Do not invent missing digits from the visible '25 Cr.' fragment or rerun same-host preprocessing variants as if they materially changed the normalization state.
